faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How long does it take to build a website?
faq.a1: Display websites typically take 7 business days. Export English websites take 10–14 business days. Complex projects are negotiated separately. Rush orders available.
faq.q2: What if I don't have English copy?
faq.a2: No problem — that's one of our core services. Provide your Chinese company intro and product materials, and we'll organize English copy, product descriptions, and SEO titles.
faq.q3: How are domain and server costs calculated?
faq.a3: Domain annual fee is approximately $14–42. Cloud ECS annual fee is approximately $70–170 depending on configuration. These are paid by the client directly or reimbursed at cost — not included in package pricing.
faq.q4: Can I update the content myself after launch?
faq.a4: Basic packages include an admin panel for updating text and images yourself. Clients with maintenance plans can send us requests directly.
faq.q5: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a5: We accept WeChat Pay, Alipay, and bank transfer. 50% deposit upon contract signing, remainder due at launch.
faq.q6: Can you guarantee the site will appear on Google?
faq.a6: We complete Google Search Console submission, sitemap, and SEO basics so your site has the technical foundation to be indexed. But search rankings are determined by Google's algorithm — specific rankings and timing cannot be guaranteed.
faq.q7: Does a Hong Kong server require ICP filing?
faq.a7: No. Alibaba Cloud's Hong Kong node is not subject to mainland China ICP filing requirements. You can launch immediately while supporting both Google and Baidu SEO.
faq.q8: Who do I contact if there are issues after launch?
faq.a8: We provide a 3-month warranty period with free bug fixes. After that, maintenance hosting plans start at $69/month — reach out anytime.
